# NetWebMedia

> AI-native fractional CMO and full-stack marketing agency for US and Chile SMBs. We combine AI-powered CRM, CMS, email, video, and chatbot automation with senior strategy execution.

## What we do
NetWebMedia builds and operates the entire marketing engine for small and mid-sized businesses: CRM, CMS, email marketing, paid ads, AI chatbots, WhatsApp automation, and AI-powered fractional CMO services. We never answer the phone — every client interaction is automated through chat, SMS, and WhatsApp.

## Products

- [NWM CRM](https://netwebmedia.com/nwm-crm.html): AI-native CRM with sales/marketing/service hubs, 11 industry-specific verticals, AI agents for SDR work
- [NWM CMS](https://netwebmedia.com/nwm-cms.html): Bilingual CMS that builds production websites in under 60 seconds with AI
- [NWM AI](https://netwebmedia.com/nwmai.html): Autonomous AI agents and automation workflows
- [Industry templates](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/): 33 production-ready CMS templates across 11 verticals
- [Pricing](https://netwebmedia.com/pricing.html): Three bundles starting at $1,295/mo (Launch / Grow / Scale)

## Industries we serve

- [Real Estate](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/real-estate/template-1.html) — luxury, agent profiles, new developments
- [Healthcare](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/healthcare/template-1.html) — medical, wellness, dental
- [E-Commerce](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/ecommerce/template-1.html) — DTC, subscription, marketplace
- [SaaS](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/saas/template-1.html) — product, developer, enterprise
- [Hospitality](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/hospitality/template-1.html) — restaurant, hotel, cafe
- [Professional Services](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/professional-services/template-1.html) — law, accounting, consulting
- [Local Services](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/local-services/template-1.html) — home, auto, beauty
- [Finance](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/finance/template-1.html) — wealth, insurance, fintech
- [Education](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/education/template-1.html) — courses, tutoring, corporate training
- [Construction](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/construction/template-1.html) — residential, commercial, remodeling
- [Agencies](https://netwebmedia.com/industries/agencies/template-1.html) — digital marketing, creative, white-label

## Courses & Playbooks

Sellable digital products — agency-grade automation systems with real templates:

- [WhatsApp Business Automation](https://netwebmedia.com/tutorials/whatsapp-automation.html) — $297, 8 modules, 180+ message templates
- [AI Chatbot Automation](https://netwebmedia.com/tutorials/chatbot-automation.html) — $347, 9 modules, 50-intent library
- [SMS & Messaging Automation](https://netwebmedia.com/tutorials/sms-automation.html) — $197, 7 modules, multi-platform
- [Full Catalogue](https://netwebmedia.com/catalogue.html) — All courses + PDF playbooks + Automation OS bundle ($697)
- [WhatsApp Playbook PDF](https://netwebmedia.com/pdf/whatsapp-automation-playbook.html) — $47
- [Chatbot Playbook PDF](https://netwebmedia.com/pdf/chatbot-automation-playbook.html) — $57

## Founder
Carlos Martinez, CEO. Based in La Serena, Chile. Serving US and LATAM markets.
